narrative:
Salt Rock Twp. township has 434 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.1 percentage points.
